mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(INO, 10) AS UNSIGNED)),0)+1 FROM ITEM WHERE INO LIKE CONCAT('I', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'),'%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ITEM (INO, IID, IPW, ITITLE, ICATEGORY, ICONTENT, ICNT, IDEAL, IPHOTO, IORPHOTO, IINSERTDATE, IUPDATEDATE, IDELETEYN ) VALUES (#{ino}, #{iid}, #{ipw}, #{ititle}, #{icategory}, #{icontent}, '0', 0, #{iphoto}, #{iorphoto}, NOW(), NOW(), 'Y')
mapper.select:
SELECT INO, ITITLE, IID, ICNT, IDEAL, IINSERTDATE, IPHOTO FROM ITEM WHERE IDELETEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY INO DESC, IINSERTDATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT I.*, (SELECT M.MNO FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.MID = I.IID) AS MNO FROM ITEM I WHERE I.INO = #{ino} OR I.INO = (SELECT INO FROM ITEM WHERE IDELETEYN = 'Y' AND INO > #{ino} ORDER BY INO ASC LIMIT 1) OR I.INO = (SELECT INO FROM ITEM WHERE IDELETEYN = 'Y' AND INO < #{ino} ORDER BY INO DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY I.INO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ITEM SET ICNT = ICNT + 1 WHERE INO = #{ino}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITEM WHERE IDELETEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE ITEM SET IDELETEYN = 'N', IUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE INO = #{ino}

choose.when: AND (ITITLE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR ICONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
